MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARTON, DONN SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-24-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-18-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-18-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON MAR-18-2003 IN DEPT. 218 - APPEARANCES MADE. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WAS PUT ON THE RECORD. TERMS WERE AS FOLLOWS: POSSESSION OF PROPERTY LOCATED AT 768 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE. ALL OCCUPANTS TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE MAY 31, 2003. DEFENDANTS TO PAY FEBRUARY AND MARCH RENTS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,794.00 TO PLAINTIFF FORTHWITH. DEFENDANTS AGREE TO PAY $847.00 ON APRIL 15, 2003. STAY UNTIL MAY 31, 2003. IF DEFENDANTS MEET ALL TERMS OF THE STIPULATION, PLAINTIFF TO FILE DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION. IF THERE IS NON-COMPLIANCE TO THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION, PLAINTIFF TO COME IN EX PARTE FOR JUDGMENT FOR ANY AMOUNTS OWING AND FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION. ALL PARTIES AGREED TO THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION. TRIAL DATE OF MARCH 24, 2003 VACATED. JUDGE: O. MARIE-VICTOIRE, CLERK: V. MU, REPORTER: P. DOWLING, #5388 (218)
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-24-2003 VACATED. CASE SETTLED. (218)

ORDER OF THE COURT REGARDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES AS RECITED ON THE RECORD. THE COURT INQUIRED IF EACH SIDE WAS MAKING THIS AGREEMENT FREELY AND VOLUNTARILY AND UPON HEARING AFFIRMATION THEREOF, THE COURT ACCEPTED THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS IN THIS ORDER AS THE FINAL SETTLEMENT OF THE ACTION AND ASKED PLTF. TO REDUCE THE TERMS TO WRITTEN FORM AND PRESENT THEM TO THE DEFENDANTS FOR SIGNATURE. THAT WAS DONE, HOWEVER, TEND DAYS HAVE PASSED AND THE DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT RETURNED THE DOCUMENT SIGNED. THE COURT HAS REVIEWED THE RECORD IN THIS ACTION AND FINDS THE ABOVE STATEMENT TO BE A TRUE AND CORRECT RECITATION OF THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. THE COURT AFFIRMS THE ABOVE SHALL BE AN ORDER OF THIS COURT TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT PURUSNAT TO THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS RECITED HEREIN.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for UD settlement.
Appearances: Donald Bloom, Esq. 415/282-3985, plaintiff Donn Warton, and defendant Norma Gomez. No appearance by defendant Jorge Gomez who is in the hospital.
* Stipulation for entry of judgment was put on the record. Terms were as follows: Possession of property located at 768 South Van Ness Avenue. All occupants to vacate on or before May 31, 2003. Defendants to pay February and March rents in the total amount of $1,794.00 to plaintiff forthwith. Defendants agree to pay $847.00 on April 15, 2003. Stay until May 31, 2003. If defendants meet all terms of the stipulation, plaintiff to file Dismissal of this action. If there is non-compliance to the terms of the stipulation, plaintiff to come in ex parte for judgment for any amounts owing and for immediate possession. All parties agreed to the terms of the stipulation. Trial date of March 24, 2003 vacated. Judge: O. Marie-Victoire, Clerk: V. Mu, Reporter: P. Dowling, #5388 (218).
